description_long: This is a classic kettle-style barbecue grill with a rounded, glossy red lid and a black bowl-shaped base. The lid features a circular vent and a handle for easy lifting, while the main body houses a metal cooking grate for grilling food. The grill stands on three angled metal legs, two of which are fitted with large, sturdy wheels for mobility, and a third leg for stability. A lower wire rack connects the legs, providing additional support and a small storage area. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, designed for durability and heat resistance. The grill's compact size and portable design make it suitable for use in parks, backyards, or urban outdoor spaces.
description: A rounded, red-lidded kettle barbecue grill with a black base, metal grate, and two large wheels for easy movement. It features a vented lid, sturdy legs, and a lower wire rack for support.
description_view_0: Two grills are shown, one with the red lid closed and the other with the lid open, revealing the metal cooking grate inside.
description_view_1: Front view with the lid open, clearly displaying the circular cooking grate and the vent on the lid.
description_view_2: Side view with one grill's lid open and the other closed, highlighting the angled legs and wheel configuration.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the closed and open lids, as well as the symmetrical leg and wheel arrangement.
